ClickActionGM.Name: GM Click Action
ClickActionGM.Hint: What happens when the GM clicks on an effect icon

ClickActionOwner.Name: Owner Click Action
ClickActionOwner.Hint: What happens when a token owner clicks on an effect icon

TooltipVisibilityMode.Name: Tooltip Visibility Mode
TooltipVisibilityMode.Hint: Determines who can see the popup tooltips when hovering over effect icons

TooltipElementsGM.Name: Tooltip Content (GM)
TooltipElementsGM.Hint: Select which elements are shown in the tooltip for the GM

TooltipElementsPlayer.Name: Tooltip Content (Player)
TooltipElementsPlayer.Hint: Select which elements are shown in the tooltip for players

InteractionRequireAlt.Name: Require Alt Key
InteractionRequireAlt.Hint: If enabled, effect interaction (hover, clicks) only works while holding the Alt key

EffectShape.Name: Effect Icon Shape
EffectShape.Hint: Choose the geometric shape for each effect icon's background

OrbitShape.Name: Orbit Shape
OrbitShape.Hint: The geometric path along which effect icons are arranged around the token

OrbitSpacing.Name: Icon Spacing
OrbitSpacing.Hint: Multiplier for the distance between adjacent effect icons on the same orbit ring

OrbitStartAngle.Name: Start Angle
OrbitStartAngle.Hint: Angle (in degrees) where the first effect icon is placed. Measured counter‑clockwise

OrbitBaseRadiusMultiplier.Name: Base Orbit Radius
OrbitBaseRadiusMultiplier.Hint: Multiplier for the radius of the first orbit ring (from token center)

OrbitReverseDirection.Name: Reverse Direction
OrbitReverseDirection.Hint: If enabled, icons are placed clockwise (otherwise counter‑clockwise). Does not affect start angle

HoverEnableAnimation.Name: Enable Hover Animation
HoverEnableAnimation.Hint: Enable smooth scaling of the effect icon when hovering the mouse over it

TooltipDelay.Name: Tooltip Delay
TooltipDelay.Hint: Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip appears when hovering
